name: 邀请返利 VIP 等级
description: 按滚动 90 天邀请成交额自动计算普通档 + 5 档 VIP 返利比例，覆盖默认邀请返利，支持升降档 Telegram 通知。
author: YueLink

enabled.label: 启用 VIP 等级
enabled.description: 关闭后所有订单回退到 admin_setting('invite_commission') 默认值

window_days.label: 滚动窗口天数
window_days.description: 向前累计多少天的返利计算 tier，主流 90 (季度) / 180 (半年)

demote_grace_days.label: 降档缓冲天数（保留字段）
demote_grace_days.description: 当前等级与返利率已改为按滚动窗口成交实时判定；该字段仅保留兼容旧配置

tiers_json.default: [{"level":0,"name":"普通","threshold":0,"rate":10,"badge":"—","color":"#9ca3af"},{"level":1,"name":"VIP1","threshold":20000,"rate":18,"badge":"青铜","color":"#cd7f32"},{"level":2,"name":"VIP2","threshold":50000,"rate":26,"badge":"白银","color":"#c0c0c0"},{"level":3,"name":"VIP3","threshold":100000,"rate":35,"badge":"黄金","color":"#fbbf24"},{"level":4,"name":"VIP4","threshold":200000,"rate":42,"badge":"铂金","color":"#67e8f9"},{"level":5,"name":"VIP5","threshold":400000,"rate":50,"badge":"钻石","color":"#a78bfa"}]
tiers_json.label: Tier 配置 (JSON)
tiers_json.description: 数组格式，threshold 单位分，按滚动窗口邀请成交额 GMV 判定，rate 0-100。修改后立即生效；保留 level=0 作 baseline

dry_run.label: Dry-run 模式
dry_run.description: 只算 tier 不覆写 order.commission_balance，用于上线前观察

telegram_notify.label: Telegram 升降档推送
telegram_notify.description: 通过 yue bot 通知 inviter，需配置下方 bot token + group id

telegram_bot_token.label: Telegram Bot Token
telegram_bot_token.description: 复用 yue bot 的 BOT_TOKEN（/opt/telegram-bot/yue/.env），仅 admin 可见

telegram_group_id.label: Telegram 群播 ID
telegram_group_id.description: L4/L5 升档群播目标，留空则不群播
